name: Maiden of White – Dragon Blessing
desc:
You can only use each effect of "Maiden of White – Dragon Blessing" once per turn.
(1) You can reveal this card in your hand; add 1 card that mentions "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" from your Deck or GY to your hand, then discard 1 card, and if you discarded "Blue-Eyes White Dragon", draw 1 card.
(2) During your opponent's turn, when your opponent activates a card or effect in their hand (Quick Effect): You can reveal this card in your hand, then target 1 "Blue-Eyes White Dragon" you control, or 1 card you control that mentions it; negate that activation. You cannot target cards with the same name with this effect for the rest of this turn.
